items.title: Oil prices hit $100 for the first time since May
items.summary: The price of Brent crude rose more than 6% on Thursday as the war in the Middle East continues to escalate.

items.title: Saudis must recognise Israel for nuclear deal, says Trump
items.summary: The US president says the landmark agreement to help Saudis develop nuclear energy is dependent on it joining the Abraham Accords.

items.title: Ukraine's ousted defence minister insists on being reinstated
items.summary: Mykhailo Fedorov refuses President Zelensky's offer to accept an alternative post, as the battle of wills continues.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 英國外相與美中外長會晤　中東烏克蘭為共同關切
items.summary: 英國新任外交大臣米勒班（Ed Miliband）在菲律賓參加東南亞國家協會（ASEAN）外交部長會議及相關論壇期間，23日分別與美國國務卿盧比歐及中國外長王毅會談，中東地區和烏克蘭情勢為兩場...…

items.title: 美媒專訪：川普考慮對伊朗重啟大型作戰行動  規模超越「史詩怒火」
items.summary: 美國總統川普23日表示，他正認真考慮對伊朗重啟大規模作戰行動，程度將超越今年2月發起的「史詩怒火行動」（Operation Epic Fury）期間所執行的空襲規模。  ...…

items.title: 泰國總理阿努廷重申一中政策　稱不影響台泰合作關係
items.summary: 外交部日前表示，泰國與中國聯合聲明貶損台灣主權，嚴重悖離事實，對泰方失望與遺憾並敦促泰方珍視兩國長久情誼，勿持續配合中國打壓。對此，泰國總理阿努廷今天回應表示，了解台灣立場，相信此事不影響泰...…
